hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today will be a fiery day full of spontaneity. Embrace new beginnings and take risks.
aries.love: Your passion will shine brightly; be open to expressing your feelings to your partner.
aries.career: An unexpected opportunity may arise; be ready to seize the moment.

taurus.general: Slow and steady wins the race today. Focus on long-term goals and be patient.
taurus.love: Stability in relationships is essential; communicate clearly with your loved ones.
taurus.career: Persistence will pay off; continue working hard and success will come.

gemini.general: Your ideas will flow effortlessly; engage in conversations that inspire you.
gemini.love: Flirtation and humor will bring joy to your interactions today.
gemini.career: Networking is key; reach out to contacts that could assist your ambitions.

cancer.general: Emotional insights are strong today; trust your intuition.
cancer.love: Deep connections are highlighted; spend quality time with those you cherish.
cancer.career: Teamwork will enhance productivity; collaborate for better outcomes.

leo.general: Your charisma is magnetic; let others be drawn to your energy.
leo.love: Romance is in the air; surprise your partner with something special.
leo.career: Take the lead on projects; your natural leadership will shine.

virgo.general: Attention to detail will pay off; focus on the minutiae today.
virgo.love: Practicality will benefit relationships; work together toward common goals.
virgo.career: Organizational skills will shine; use this time to streamline processes.

libra.general: Seek harmony in your surroundings; balance will be achieved through cooperation.
libra.love: Open dialogues will deepen connections; listen as much as you speak.
libra.career: Creative solutions will emerge; think outside the box.

scorpio.general: Your intensity is heightened; channel it into productive outlets.
scorpio.love: Vulnerability can lead to greater intimacy; share your true feelings.
scorpio.career: Strategic planning is essential; map out your goals carefully.

sagittarius.general: Adventure beckons; embrace new experiences and explore possibilities.
sagittarius.love: Fun and spontaneity will liven your romantic life.
sagittarius.career: Innovation is key; don’t hesitate to suggest new ideas.

capricorn.general: Your hard work is about to pay off; stay focused on your aims.
capricorn.love: Realism in love matters will cultivate greater appreciation.
capricorn.career: Leadership roles are favored; take charge of projects today.

aquarius.general: Inspiration strikes; embrace your creative side.
aquarius.love: Friendship and love blend harmoniously; let these connections flourish.
aquarius.career: Team efforts yield rewarding results; collaborate effectively.

pisces.general: Emotional currents are strong; go with the flow and trust your instincts.
pisces.love: Nurture the emotional bond you share with others.
pisces.career: Intuition guides your professional paths; trust your gut feelings.

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: You miss 100% of the shots you don’t take.
professional.author: Wayne Gretzky

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Dream it. Wish it. Do it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Success doesn’t just find you. You have to go out and get it.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Embrace the chaos, where the magic happens.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Find your joy in the journey, not just the destination.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Discover the extraordinary in the ordinary.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: You are the artist of your own life.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The Internet is becoming the town square for the global village of tomorrow.
tech.author: Bill Gates

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Technology, like art, is a soaring exercise of the human imagination.
tech.author: Daniel Bell

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

fun.text: Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.
fun.author: Margaret Mead

fun.text: I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not too sure.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: The early bird might get the worm, but the second mouse gets the cheese.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: I'm on my way to a better me; please excuse the detours.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Don't worry if plan A doesn't work out, there are 25 more letters in the alphabet.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Everything that is done in the world is done by hope.
faith.author: Martin Luther

faith.text: To be a Christian means to forgive the inexcusable because God has forgiven the inexcusable in you.
faith.author: C.S. Lewis

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: A strong faith can move mountains.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith does not eliminate questions. But faith knows where to take them.
faith.author: Elisabeth Elliot

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward for a lifetime of listening when you would rather have talked.
wisdom.author: Marilyn vos Savant

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, the first step is silence, the second listening, the third remembering.
wisdom.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The wiser you get, the more you realize how little you know.
wisdom.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: Patience is the companion of wisdom.
wisdom.author: Saint Augustine
